diagrams.title: Nested Structure Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how nested structures are stored contiguously in memory with example
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how nested structures occupy memory contiguously and how members are accessed

diagrams.title: Member Access Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Illustrates the chain of accessing nested members using dot and arrow operators
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the path taken when accessing deeply nested members in a structure

diagrams.title: Nested Structure Hierarchy Example
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing hierarchical relationship between Employee and its nested components
diagrams.purpose: Understanding has-a relationships and planning nested structure design for real-world entities
